headline: Bristol-Myers Squibb Collaboration Adds New Dimension To Oncology Valuation Story
summary: Bristol-Myers Squibb, NYSE:BMY, has entered a new collaboration with Oxford BioTherapeutics to develop T-cell engager therapies for solid tumours. The alliance focuses on using Oxford BioTherapeutics' target discovery technologies to identify and advance next-generation oncology candidates. This development expands Bristol-Myers Squibb's oncology pipeline and adds fresh assets to its research and development efforts. For investors watching NYSE:BMY, this collaboration comes as the stock...
